case_title: ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS, INC. VS CITY OF REFUGE TABERNACLE, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,562.13 FILED BY ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF REFUGE TABERNACLE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF REFUGE TABERNACLE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY OF REFUGE TABERNACLE, INC. $3,562.13 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,632.13 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
